beats: The mother finally speaks, her voice steady.
She looks at the protagonist with knowing eyes.

dialogue.speaker: Mother
dialogue.text: 真的不是人，是愿意承担真相的那个。

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 母亲终于开口：真的不是人，是愿意承担真相的那个。
